description.p: eastStar replaces the blank screen experience with animated fullscreen visuals on GNOME. It watches inactivity through Mutter's idle monitor and launches a saver when your configured delay is reached.
Includes three visual effects: Nebula Flight, Pipes (3D classic), and Fractal Plasma. All visuals are burn-in safe with OLED-friendly dark mode and drifting bright areas.
Bug fix: mouse cursor is now hidden during fullscreen saver.
Added AppStream metainfo for proper GNOME Software integration with icon, description, and screenshots.
Added background daemon with systemd user service. Daemon auto-starts after installation — no relogin required. RPM packages now built with rpmbuild for proper Software Center compatibility.
